jsonLd.title: Fire-Boltt is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!
